scripts.dev:stable: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run start:user
scripts.qa:server: npm run build && npm run start:qa
scripts.test:e2e:qa:real-ai: OPENAI_API_KEY="${OPENAI_API_KEY:-$(sed -n 's/^OPENAI_API_KEY=//p' .env.local | head -n 1)}" PLAYWRIGHT_REAL_AI=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3100 playwright test tests/e2e/planner.real-ai.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:qa:real-ai:clean: rm -rf .next && OPENAI_API_KEY="${OPENAI_API_KEY:-$(sed -n 's/^OPENAI_API_KEY=//p' .env.local | head -n 1)}" PLAYWRIGHT_REAL_AI=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3100 playwright test tests/e2e/planner.real-ai.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:qa:real-ai:headed: OPENAI_API_KEY="${OPENAI_API_KEY:-$(sed -n 's/^OPENAI_API_KEY=//p' .env.local | head -n 1)}" PLAYWRIGHT_REAL_AI=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3100 PLAYWRIGHT_HEADED=1 playwright test tests/e2e/planner.real-ai.spec.ts
scripts.qa:m5: npm run check:planner && npm run test:e2e:qa && npm run build
